mapper.select: SELECT o.order_id AS orderId, DATE_FORMAT(o.order_time, CONCAT(MONTH(o.order_time), '월 ', DAY(o.order_time), '일(', ELT(DAYOFWEEK(o.order_time),'일','월','화','수','목','금','토'), ')') ) AS date, s.store_name AS storeName, s.store_pic AS storeImage, o.amount AS totalPrice, o.delivery_fee AS deliveryFee, o.order_state AS orderState, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM review r WHERE r.order_id = o.order_id) AS hasReview FROM orders o JOIN store s ON s.store_id = o.store_id WHERE o.user_no = #{userId} ORDER BY o.order_time DESC LIMIT #{startIdx}, #{size}

SELECT o.order_id AS orderId, DATE_FORMAT(o.order_time, CONCAT( YEAR(o.order_time), '년 ', MONTH(o.order_time), '월 ', DAY(o.order_time), '일 ', IF(HOUR(o.order_time) < 12, '오전 ', '오후 '), LPAD(IF(HOUR(o.order_time) % 12 = 0, 12, HOUR(o.order_time) % 12), 1, '0'), ':', LPAD(MINUTE(o.order_time), 2, '0') ) ) AS date, s.store_name AS storeName, s.store_pic AS storeImage, s.store_id AS storeId, o.amount AS totalPrice, o.delivery_fee AS deliveryFee, o.order_state AS orderState FROM orders o JOIN store s ON s.store_id = o.store_id WHERE o.order_id = #{id}

SELECT o.order_id AS orderId, o.order_time AS orderTime, od.menu_name AS menuName, od.menu_price * od.quantity AS orderAmount FROM orders o JOIN order_detail od ON od.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.store_id = #{storeId} AND o.order_time >= #{start} AND o.order_time < #{end} AND o.order_state != 2 ORDER BY o.order_time DESC, od.detail_id ASC
